battle_runtime: Use turn_behavior_by_history to calibrate land/spell/mana/combat cadence.
Use common_turn_patterns to detect implausible battle action sequences.
deckbuilder: Use card_lifecycle access/use/lag metrics to require observed exposure before scoring swaps.
Do not treat high win rate on a Limited Arena ID as Commander recommendation.
limits: 17Lands replay_data does not expose exact stack choices, targets, or complete card rules.
Arena IDs need annotation before card-name interpretation.
PremierDraft histories are behavior priors, not Commander strategy truth.
